response.justification: The candidate lacks the specialized expertise in SoC modeling, hardware-software co-design, AI accelerator optimization, and deep-learning workload analysis required for this principal-level role. While their experience in software development and performance optimization is notable, it does not align closely enough with the hardware-centric and AI-specific demands of the position.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in performance optimization and system architecture
Demonstrated ability to work across multiple programming languages and technology stacks
Proven track record of building scalable systems and contributing to open-source projects
concerns: No evidence of hardware design, SoC/IP modeling, or AI accelerator optimization experience
Lacks required education or experience path for principal-level hardware engineering roles (e.g., no PhD, limited hardware-focused roles)
No direct experience with SIMD/MIMD architectures, GPU optimization, or deep neural network workload analysis
